# kemp_add_header_rule (Data Source)

Reads a system-level add-header rule by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "kemp_add_header_rule" "existing" {
  name = "add-x-forwarded-for"
}

output "header" {
  value = data.kemp_add_header_rule.existing.header
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Rule name.

### Read-Only

- `header` (String) Header field name to add.
- `only_on_flag` (Number)
- `only_on_no_flag` (Number)
- `replacement` (String) Header value.
